title: Wither: Reincarnated
description: A mod that improves Minecraft's lacklustre Wither boss
body: # About The Wither is not a very good boss: it only has one attack and no interesting movement patterns, and the fight requires very little skill. This mod aims to fix that, giving the Wither new attacks, a new phase and more in an attempt to make the fight more fun and engaging. # What kind of changes does the mod make? ⦁ The Wither now has a more intimidating model and sounds ⦁ The world will turn to night permanently while the Wither is alive ⦁ The Wither has a new first phase where it focuses on destroying the world instead of directly targeting players ⦁ The Wither can now use a powerful Beacon-like laser attack that you'll be vaporized by without sufficient cover ⦁ The Wither now has a charge attack, which can be blocked using a Shield to stun the Wither ⦁ The Wither now has an attack where it will fly up and shoot a barrage of Wither Skulls at the ground ⦁ "Dangerous" Wither Skulls can now be deflected like Ghast fireballs to deal extra damage to the Wither ⦁ Wither Skulls will now have bigger explosions and produce fire, which can be seen from a distance ⦁ The Wither will now attack much more violently in its final phase ⦁ The Wither will now fly around its target instead of hovering directly above them ⦁ Most mobs will now run away from the Wither ⦁ The Wither can now possess nearby undead mobs. Possessed mobs will follow the Wither and defend it # How to add possessed eye layers for modded undead ⦁ Make a resource pack that changes the mob's texture to one that only has the mob's eyes (and make the eyes all white) ⦁ Add `_possessed_witherreincarnated` to the end of the texture file name (before the `.png`) ⦁ Enable the resource pack, and you're done! # Credits ⦁ Certain sounds are modified versions of sounds from Minecraft and Minecraft Dungeons ⦁ Credit to JoTurtleguy for providing the first version of the Wither's new boss bar # Listen to the soundtrack on YouTube # [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/20a1f917-fbe2-49bb-b6be-2ca9ebec7cd1.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/alexandersfunandgames) If you need a server to play Minecraft with your friends, try out Bisect Hosting! Use my code ***alexandersfunandgames*** to get 25% off your first month!
